ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the game was played */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, finals) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, in-progress, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference to which the team belongs */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division to which the team belongs */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins of the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., hardwood, synthetic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contract" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the event occurred */,
  "clock" INTEGER /* Game clock time in seconds when the event occurred */,
  "foul" INTEGER /* Indicates if a foul occurred during the event */,
  "isFreeThrow" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is a free-throw */,
  "make" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shot was made */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored from the event */,
  "qtr" INTEGER /* Quarter in which the event occurred */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate on the court where the event occurred */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate on the court where the event occurred */,
  "shot_type" TEXT /* Type of shot (e.g., jump shot, layup, three-pointer) */,
  "shot_distance" REAL /* Distance of the shot in feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's game statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls by the player */,
  "fg_attempts" INTEGER /* Total field goal attempts by the player */,
  "fg_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made by the player */,
  "ft_attempts" INTEGER /* Total free throw attempts by the player */,
  "ft_made" INTEGER /* Total free throws made by the player */,
  "three_pt_attempts" INTEGER /* Total three-point attempts by the player */,
  "three_pt_made" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game's statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "home_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the home team */,
  "away_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the away team */,
  "home_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the home team */,
  "away_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the away team */,
  "home_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the home team */,
  "away_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the away team */,
  "home_steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the home team */,
  "away_steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the away team */,
  "home_blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the home team */,
  "away_blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the away team */,
  "home_fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls by the home team */,
  "away_fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user has */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being predicted */,
  "predicted_home_points" INTEGER /* Predicted points for the home team */,
  "predicted_away_points" INTEGER /* Predicted points for the away team */,
  "probability_home_win" REAL /* Probability of the home team winning */,
  "probability_away_win" REAL /* Probability of the away team winning */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
